description.ko: 복잡한 주파수 패턴을 생동감 넘치는 3차원 기하학적 풍경으로 변환하여, 소리의 보이지 않는 질감을 실시간으로 시각화하는 정교한 시스템입니다.
description.en: A sophisticated system that translates complex frequency patterns into vibrant, three-dimensional geometric landscapes, visualizing the unseen texture of sound in real-time.

prompt: Cinematic close-up of ECHO-0, a futuristic spherical core floating in a dark void, emitting iridescent sound waves that crystallize into glowing fractal structures, neon blue and deep violet light pulses, high-tech aesthetic, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, macro photography of digital vibrations.
